subcodes.first_line: O My servant! By My life, thy remembrance is more excellent than the choicest wine, more beloved than Salsabíl, and purer than the waters of Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عبدی لعمری انه افضل من الرحیق و احب من السلسبیل و اصفی من کوثر الحیوان
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
